base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of title_logo_metroid — a ui (typography) from 1986 metroid. 'METROID' title-banner — bold pixel-font on starfield background. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 'METROID' title-banner — bold pixel-font on starfield background; iconic NES title-screen
